post_hoc_scope_disclosure: The frozen base parameters were selected after the 2018-2023 parent screen. Therefore 2018-2023 is now research only; 2024 is the next validation year and 2025 remains the final candidate-specific holdout.

feature_contract.sma20_align: Prior completed session close is above/below the prior-session SMA20 in trade direction.
feature_contract.momentum5_align: Prior completed session close minus the close five completed sessions earlier has trade-direction sign.
feature_contract.prior_session_align: Prior completed session close minus prior session open has trade-direction sign.
feature_contract.majority_2_of_3_align: At least two of the three prior-completed-session features align.
feature_contract.entry_timestamp_usage: Filter lookup uses the trade's exchange-local entry date; no current-session data beyond the already frozen gap and opening impulse is added.

research_survivor_rule: A non-control filter must have at least 200 research trades, pooled PF strictly above raw control, at least four positive research years, and worst annual PF at least 0.90.
selection_rule: Select once by highest worst annual PF, then pooled PF, then trade count.
validation_open_rule: Open 2024 only for the frozen research survivor; require at least 40 trades, PF>=1.10, and positive net R.
holdout_open_rule: Open 2025 once only if the same frozen filter passes 2024; require at least 40 trades, PF>=1.10, and positive net R.
label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
